text:
Once upon a time in the middle ages, there was a humble farmer named Thomas. He lived a rustic life working on his farm with his faithful ox named Barney. One autumn day, while collecting apples from the orchard, Thomas stumbled upon an old wooden trunk hidden beneath fallen leaves. Inside was an unusual book titled 'The Chronicles of Dreamland.'

Excitedly reading its tales of adventure and magic, Thomas found himself eager to explore. He decided to carry it home. His wife Martha found him staring at it late one night, dreaming of dragons flying behind clouds. Thinking it couldn’t hurt him, she read aloud a few pages. Soon,Thomas couldn’t sleep, weaving dream visions of fairy rings and enchanted gardens.

Inspired, Thomas decided to summon his dreams to reality. He built an invisible fence around his sleeping quarters using old fencing ropes tied together. Every night, he dreamed of clearing forests and battling villains. Eventually, dream villagers called upon him. They needed help protecting treasure hidden deep
